channel.title: The Diaspora App Blog
channel.description: Business guides, event playbooks, advertising strategy, and community stories for the global diaspora.

item.title: How Diaspora Businesses Can Turn Local Attention Into Real Orders
item.description: A practical approach to premium placements, city targeting, and direct WhatsApp leads for diaspora businesses.

item.title: A Simple Launch Plan for Community Events That Sell Out
item.description: How hosts can package an event page, registration flow, city targeting, and sponsor inventory.

item.title: Making a Marketplace Search-Ready for Google and AI Crawlers
item.description: The technical layer behind sitemap discovery, structured data, RSS, and public HTML pages.
